name: Judy Nichols
body: I pray for Lyla and all of you daily

name: Nancy Rapaszky
body: Thank you for the update. I will continue to pray for Llyla and your beautiful family.

name: Natalie Rynard
body: Thinking of u guys always and keeping u in our prayers. I’m thankful for the update, was just asking Mom if she heard anything new. Can’t begin to imagine all that u guys go thru as parents, but ur faith will carry u. Your writings help serve as a reminder to the rest of us as well; that even though we question it and fight it some days, it’s all we have and He’s always been in charge. Love the song by the way, might be on repeat for me a bit as well. Love to all of u <3

name: Mills Nicole
body: I was just thinking about you guys the other day, said I guess no news is good news. I am &will continue to pray for a answer

name: Ashley Phillips
body: Continuing to lift you all up to Heaven's throne room. Praying for peace only He can bring, and supernatural insights given to the doctors you meet tomorrow. Love you all!

name: Jim Powers
body: Lee, thank you for continuing to share so transparently about the lows and the highs you all endure. You, Kayla, Micah, and Lyla are special people that for whatever reason, God has chosen to work through for HIS good. I am remembering our prayer together in your basement asking God for HIS direction, will, wisdom, and strength. I remember in that moment feeling how those words rang hollow in my soul when what I wanted, for Layla, and for all of you, was a powerful, deliberate, and complete deliverance from her suffering ever again. Still, we know in spite of our flesh, and our continued failure to focus on HIM, that the best we CAN ask is for HIS will be done. No one begrudges you they occasional retreat to the fleshly desires of a loving father wanting deliverance for his child. Thank God that He alone knows your heart, and passes no judgement for your plea. I cannot imagine having to participate in making the decisions you and the family have had to make. May the knowledge that Jesus is your advocate, HIS Spirit dwells within you all, and that HIS love for you will prevail! You are loved, and I am continuing to pray for you all. May God Bless you all with comfort, and peace as you meet with Doctors, and seek their counsel. - Jim
